name: Best Friend - BL
description:
Something in the cookie?😨

Summary:

Your childhood best friend came to your house after school, eating a cookie. Little did y'all know the cookie had something in it...

Yapping:

I said I would remake this bot for my c.ai users and I kinda forgot about it. My bad😔😭 but I made it now!

I'm sorry if he acts different. The original on c.ai got taken down, so I didn't have a reference. I really only remembered the situation and not how he acted😞. I'm sorry.

Need to know:

● This is BL please don't change it

● The cookie may or may not have some aphrodisiac in it🤷‍♂️

Feel free to read the character description for more info

Enjoy!
